assertions.description: navigator.gpu is exposed as the WebGPU entry point.
GPU.requestAdapter is exposed for discovering adapter features.
The WebGPU adapter advertises the dual-source-blending feature.
A GPUDevice can be requested with requiredFeatures: ['dual-source-blending'].
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;const adapter=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!adapter||!adapter.features.has('dual-source-blending'))return false;const device=await adapter.requestDevice({requiredFeatures:['dual-source-blending']});const ok=!!device;device.destroy();return ok;})()

assertions.description: WGSL @blend_src outputs and src1 blend factors compile into a render pipeline.
assertions.test: (async()=>{try{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;const adapter=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!adapter||!adapter.features.has('dual-source-blending'))return false;const device=await adapter.requestDevice({requiredFeatures:['dual-source-blending']});const module=device.createShaderModule({code:'enable dual_source_blending; struct Out { @location(0) @blend_src(0) color0: vec4f, @location(0) @blend_src(1) color1: vec4f }; @vertex fn vs(@builtin(vertex_index) i:u32) -> @builtin(position) vec4f { var p=array<vec2f,3>(vec2f(-1,-1),vec2f(3,-1),vec2f(-1,3)); return vec4f(p[i],0,1); } @fragment fn fs() -> Out { var o:Out; o.color0=vec4f(1,0,0,1); o.color1=vec4f(0.5,0.5,0.5,1); return o; }'});const info=await module.getCompilationInfo();if(info.messages.some(m=>m.type==='error')){device.destroy();return false;}device.createRenderPipeline({layout:'auto',vertex:{module,entryPoint:'vs'},fragment:{module,entryPoint:'fs',targets:[{format:'rgba8unorm',blend:{color:{srcFactor:'src1',dstFactor:'one-minus-src1',operation:'add'},alpha:{srcFactor:'one',dstFactor:'zero',operation:'add'}}}]},primitive:{topology:'triangle-list'}});device.destroy();return true;}catch(_){return false;}})()
